title: EdonMe Survival
description: The best survival modpack you need to Have!
body:
[![Sparked Host](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1330912431496495165/1490018985675198534/Artboard_2-1.png?ex=69d287d1&is=69d13651&hm=fa99fc9a0f45b09a7ef09ae91ba8f79d8cd7e3b1a06fd73b17010a9561bbfad1&)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3220)

# 💻 Downloads

> **We are only on modrinth (for now)**

[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ee01197a4d521e02d4372ad14c55f03c30f14d.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/edonme-survival/versions)

---

# 🌿 About

> **A complete, handcrafted survival experience — no bloat, just good mods.**
> EdonMe Survival brings together the best content, QoL, and performance mods for a rich and smooth vanilla-plus experience. New biomes, new blocks, new food, new weapons, smart storage systems, voice chat, minimap, and much more — all carefully picked to work together seamlessly.

---

## ⚡ What to expect?

- 🚀 **Solid performance** with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, C2ME and more
- 🌍 **World enhancements** — new biomes, structures and dimensions with Enderscape, Deimos and others
- 🍖 **Expanded food & farming** via Farmer's Delight, Crate Delight, More Delight and others
- 🗄️ **Smart storage** with Storage Drawers, Extended Drawers, Tom's Storage and Copper Hopper
- 🗺️ **Xaero's Minimap & World Map** built in
- 🎙️ **Simple Voice Chat** for playing with friends
- 🔫 **Point Blank** — guns and combat expansion
- 🪄 **Advanced Netherite, Enchancement** and more progression tweaks
- 🖥️ **Discord Rich Presence** and custom window title
- 🎨 **Visual polish** — 3D Skin Layers, Entity Model/Texture Features, Elytra Trims, Continuity and more

---

## 📦 Included Mods

### 🔧 Performance
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Sodium + Sodium Extra** | Optimized renderer — massive FPS boost |
| **Lithium** | Optimizes game logic (AI, physics, chunks) |
| **FerriteCore** | Drastically reduces RAM usage |
| **C2ME** | Multithreaded chunk generation |
| **Entity Culling + More Culling** | Skips rendering entities/blocks outside view |
| **ImmediatelyFast** | Speeds up entity and HUD rendering |
| **Cull Leaves** | Reduces leaf rendering overhead |
| **Packet Fixer** | Fixes oversized packet crashes |

### 🌍 World & Content
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Enderscape** | New End dimension content |
| **Blockus** | Tons of new decorative blocks |
| **Rechiseled** | Chiseled block variants |
| **Night Lights** | New lighting decorations |
| **Explosive Enhancement** | Visual improvements to explosions |
| **Leaf Me Alone** | Stops leaves from decaying unnecessarily |
| **Lithostitched** | World generation stitching improvements |

### 🍖 Food & Farming
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Farmer's Delight** | Massive food and farming expansion |
| **Crate Delight** | Crate-based food addon for Farmer's Delight |
| **More Delight** | Additional Farmer's Delight content |

### 🗄️ Storage
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Storage Drawers** | Compact, visual item storage |
| **Extended Drawers** | Addon for Storage Drawers |
| **Tom's Storage** | Networked storage system |
| **Copper Hopper** | Filtered hopper variant |
| **Simple Copper Pipes** | Item transport via copper pipes |

### ⚔️ Combat & Progression
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Point Blank** | Firearms and combat expansion |
| **Advanced Netherite** | New Netherite tiers and progression |
| **Enchancement** | Expanded enchanting system |
| **Carry On** | Pick up and carry mobs and blocks |
| **Trade Cycling** | Refresh villager trades easily |
| **Tiny Mob Farm** | Compact automated mob farms |

### 🗺️ Navigation & Utility
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Xaero's Minimap** | In-game minimap |
| **Xaero's World Map** | Full world map |
| **Nature's Compass** | Find biomes easily |
| **Chunky** | Pre-generate chunks for better performance |
| **Chunk Loaders** | Keep chunks loaded while offline |
| **Open Parties & Claims** | Chunk claiming and party system |
| **e4mc** | Open your world to friends without a server |
| **Fabric Carpet** | Advanced server utilities and tweaks |

### 🖥️ Interface & QoL
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Jade** | Shows info about blocks and entities |
| **JEI** | Browse and search all recipes in-game |
| **AppleSkin** | Hunger saturation and exhaustion display |
| **Shulker Box Tooltip** | Preview shulker contents on hover |
| **Mouse Tweaks** | Improved inventory mouse controls |
| **Accurate Block Placement** | Precise block placement for builders |
| **Controlling** | Search bar for keybindings menu |
| **Zoomify** | Configurable zoom |
| **Mod Menu** | In-game mod list and settings |
| **Banner Text** | Write text on banners |
| **CC: Tweaked** | Programmable computers and turtles |
| **RC Toys** | Remote-controlled toys and gadgets |

### 🎨 Visuals
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **3D Skin Layers** | Renders skin layers in 3D |
| **Entity Model Features** | Custom entity models (CEM) |
| **Entity Texture Features** | Custom entity textures (ETF) |
| **Elytra Trims** | Apply armor trims to elytras |
| **Continuity** | Connected textures support |
| **Fusion** | Connected textures alternative |
| **Sound Physics Remastered** | Realistic sound propagation and reverb |
| **More Discs** | New music discs |
| **Camerapture** | In-game camera and photography |
| **Sodium Fullbright** | Optional fullbright toggle |

### 🎙️ Social & Presence
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Simple Voice Chat** | Proximity voice chat |
| **Audio Player** | Play custom audio in-game |
| **CraftPresence** | Discord Rich Presence |
| **Custom Window Title** | Customize the game window title |
| **No Chat Reports** | Removes chat reporting signatures |

### 🛠️ Libraries & Base
| Mod | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Fabric API** | Essential base for all Fabric mods |
| **Architectury** | Cross-platform mod framework |
| **Cloth Config / YACL** | Config APIs |
| **Fabric Language Kotlin** | Kotlin support for mods |
| **GeckoLib** | Animation library |
| **FrozenLib / MidnightLib / UniLib / Owo Lib** | Utility libraries |
| **Forge Config API Port** | Ports Forge config system to Fabric |
| **Placeholder API** | Placeholder support for HUD mods |

---

## 🖥️ Requirements

| | Minimum | Recommended |
|---|---|---|
| **Minecraft** | 1.21.11 | 1.21.11 |
| **Loader** | Fabric 0.18.5 | Fabric 0.18.5 |
| **RAM** | 4 GB allocated | 6 GB allocated |
| **Java** | Java 21 | Java 21 |
